task: Make VP training save transitions fast instead of masking slow saves with longer timeouts

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires actual verification at the relevant user-facing path, not just reporting that code changed.
Code, UI, deploy, and customer-facing changes require completion evidence guard validation before completion reporting.

changes: Removed the special 45 second timeout from the Day 0 to Day 1 confirmation sync; the normal API timeout is used again.
Kept the loading overlay only as immediate visual feedback while the save request is in flight.
Stopped /api/edu/vp-training/session/sync from attaching personalized curriculum data in the save response.
Stopped /api/edu/vp-training/artifact from attaching personalized curriculum data in the save response.
Added a 10 minute server-side cache for curriculum evidence rows so initial session enrichment does not repeatedly reload the same evidence table.
Added regression tests proving sync and artifact save paths do not call _edu_vp_attach_personalized_curriculum.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-DENhIuaj.js

verification.name: save path source guard
verification.result: passed: backend has cached curriculum rows; Day 0 sync timeout override and sync timeoutMs were removed

residual_risk: Live authenticated click timing was not available in this session; regression coverage verifies the expensive curriculum attach call is removed from save endpoints, and production bundle/API deployment verification is run after deploy.
